curation.synopsis: Captured after the running engagement between Lion El'Jonson and Konrad Curze, the Night Lords' First Captain Sevatar languishes in a Dark Angels gaol. The cell is small, the ship is silent, and the killer is going slowly mad - voices crowd his head, prophecies he never asked for, the laughter of dead men. His warder Altani draws him into a strange nightly dialogue, and through the dark hours Sevatar circles questions of damnation, fatherhood and what little compassion remains to a son of the Night Haunter. A claustrophobic character study of the Heresy's most articulate murderer, set in the long silence between the Thramas Crusade and the fleet's eventual breakout.

flags.reason: story is set aboard an unnamed Dark Angels gaol-ship without a concrete geographic anchor
